positive: A stylized and symmetrical representation of deep forest fauna and celestial elements. Features majestic woodland creatures (like stylized deer, owls, and foxes) intertwined with detailed floral motifs (ferns, wildflowers, blooming lotus) and crescent moons. The style must be graphic, utilizing strong line art and clean, bold silhouettes, reminiscent of Victorian engraving and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints. Limited color palette: deep indigo, emerald green, burnt orange, and creamy white background, ensuring high contrast on apparel fabric. Composition should be highly centralized and circular, forming a perfect printable design element. Minimal shading, maximum graphic impact. Vector illustration quality.
negative: blurry, artifact, noise, lowres, jpeg artifacts, text, signature, watermark, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, realistic photograph, low contrast, washed out, sloppy, grayscale only
